calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq., for the Plaintiff Willie Wong
Willie Wong sworn and examined on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant Chi Hung Wong.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited and canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1331 Stockton Street, # 414 San Francisco, CA 94133.
Damages $780.00
Holdover damages $575.00
Attorney's fees: waived.
Costs per filing of Memorandum of Costs.
for a Total Judgment of $1,355.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Willie Wong is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chi Hung Wong DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of AUG-12-2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
